meta.name: Cell types & neighborhoods by region
meta.description: After regions are annotated, plot how cell-type composition and how neighborhood composition differ across regions — two stacked-bar crosstabs (cell types by region, then neighborhoods by region).
meta.provenance: Region composition (per-region crosstab + chi-square), original to this repository. Step 5 of the Xenium region-analysis workflow.

readme: Step 5 of the workflow — run after you have annotated regions (draw labels or promote an obs column into a region set) and produced cell-type labels (recipe 3) and neighborhoods (recipe 4). Draws two stacked-bar charts: cell-type proportions per region, then neighborhood proportions per region, each with a descriptive chi-square p-value (single section, n=1 per region). Set `region_key` to your annotated region column.

params.name: region_key
params.tooltip: annotated region column to compare across

params.name: cell_type_key
params.tooltip: cell-type column to break down by region

params.name: neighborhood_key
params.tooltip: neighborhood column to break down by region
